pr.title: Non-record: 11L GEPA + 25k Steps + Pure Int6 + Legal TTT (val_bpb=1.0944)

output.summary: 11-layer GEPA trained 25k steps with a 13k-step warmdown, pure int6 GPTQ-lite compression, and legal score-first TTT for compact leaderboard-ready submission.
techniques: Extended long warmdown after peak LR to squeeze more progress at near-zero LR
Pure int6 per-row GPTQ-lite clip search (15 candidates) plus zstd-22 compression for tiny artifact
Legal score-first TTT with SGD momentum on frozen prefix layers
